text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Badum ba da duuum. ♪ This is Agent Ma. I have
eyes on the target.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
You caught Machan acting out the movie she
watched yesterday. Zooming by in her Machan
car, carrying out missions—a real secret agent.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Whizz, bang! "The name's Machan, Aston
Machan." Heh.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, if being a mascot wasn't my calling, maybe
I would've set out to become Agent Machan
instead.
